planSteps.description: Click the button with data-testid deploy-arena
The list with data-testid result-ranking contains at least 2 rows ranking this match's own gladiators by score
When the element with data-testid leaderboard-list is visible, it represents world leaderboard standings (persisted across matches), not a required duplicate of the result-ranking rows
Click the button with data-testid back-to-guild
